title: Double-Digit Dividend Growth And Strong Secular Tailwinds Make Invitation Homes A Buy
text: Invitation Homes trades near a 52-week low. This means the dividend, which has a double-digit 5-year growth rate, provides a yield well above historical levels.

title: 3 REITs That Should Rock In 2023
text: The year has been a testing ground for investors. The following three REITs will get 2023 off the a good start.

title: Time to Buy These 3 REITs for 2023?
text: There may be more short-term weakness ahead among REITs, but these equities are attractive at some of their lowest valuations in years.

title: Single Family Rental REITs: Operating Expenses Are Up, But Business Still Performing
text: There was a fair degree of commonality amongst the three single-family rental (SFR) REITs this past reporting season. Higher operating expenses impacted the SFR industry in similar ways as the line item affected the broader rental housing sub-sectors.

title: Invitation Homes Announces Voluntary Prepayment of IH 2018-1 Securitization
text: DALLAS--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Invitation Homes Inc. (NYSE: INVH) (“Invitation Homes” or the “Company”) announced today that it has voluntarily prepaid the outstanding balance of its IH 2018-1 securitization.
